seo.title: 12-Shot Storyboard, One-Click Video Generation | OpenCreator
seo.description: Transform product images into professional 12-panel storyboards and generate complete TVC ads with AI. Create cinematic brand videos from a single product photo using Nano Banana Pro and Sora 2.

hero.title: 12-Shot Storyboard, One-Click Video Generation
hero.description: Transform any product image into a professional 12-panel storyboard and generate a complete TVC ad video with AI. Upload your product, get a cinematic brand commercial with consistent characters and voiceover—all in one workflow.

steps.title: Upload your product image
steps.description: Provide a product photo—lipstick, sunglasses, electronics, or any item. The AI will analyze your product and prepare it for storyboard creation.

steps.title: AI generates 12-panel storyboard
steps.description: Nano Banana Pro creates a professional 12-grid storyboard in black-and-white sketch style, designing a creative story that showcases your product with consistent character and brand elements.

steps.title: One-click video generation
steps.description: Sora 2 transforms the storyboard into a 25-second live-action TVC ad with Chinese voiceover, maintaining character consistency and product accuracy throughout the video.

steps.title: Download your brand commercial
steps.description: Export your professional TVC ad ready for social media, e-commerce platforms, or brand campaigns. Complete with cinematic quality and brand storytelling.

whoIsFor.title: Perfect for brands and marketers who need video ads fast
whoIsFor.subtitle: From product launches to social campaigns, see who creates TVC ads with AI.

audiences.label: E-commerce brands
audiences.description: Create professional product commercials without expensive video production teams. Turn any product photo into a compelling brand story video.

audiences.label: Marketing teams
audiences.description: Generate multiple ad variations quickly for A/B testing and campaign optimization. Produce TVC-quality content at a fraction of traditional costs.

audiences.label: Content creators
audiences.description: Produce cinematic product showcases for sponsored content and brand partnerships. Stand out with professional video storytelling.

audiences.label: Advertising agencies
audiences.description: Rapidly prototype commercial concepts for client pitches. Visualize creative ideas before committing to full production budgets.

items.question: What is the 12-Shot Storyboard workflow?
items.answer: This AI workflow transforms a single product image into a professional 12-panel storyboard, then generates a complete 25-second TVC ad video. It uses Nano Banana Pro for storyboard creation and Sora 2 for video generation with voiceover.

items.question: What AI models power this workflow?
items.answer: The workflow uses Nano Banana Pro (google/gemini-3.0-flash-image) for generating the 12-panel storyboard in sketch style, and Sora 2 (opencreator-fal-sora2-pro-i2v-v1) for converting the storyboard into a live-action video with voiceover.

items.question: What kind of products work best?
items.answer: Any product works well—cosmetics, fashion accessories, electronics, food items, and more. The AI adapts the story and visual style to match your product category and brand positioning.

items.question: How long is the generated video?
items.answer: The workflow generates a 25-second TVC ad video, which is the optimal length for social media ads and product showcases. The video includes professional pacing and Chinese voiceover.

items.question: Can I customize the story or character?
items.answer: Yes. You can modify the prompts to specify character appearance (e.g., Asian female, European male), story theme, and visual style. The workflow maintains consistency throughout the storyboard and video.

items.question: What's the output quality?
items.answer: The storyboard is generated at 16:9 aspect ratio, and the video is produced in high resolution suitable for social media platforms, e-commerce listings, and brand campaigns.

items.question: How long does generation take?
items.answer: The complete workflow typically takes 3-8 minutes: about 30 seconds for storyboard generation and 2-7 minutes for video creation, depending on server load.

items.question: How are credits calculated?
items.answer: Credits are consumed based on the AI models used—Nano Banana Pro for image generation and Sora 2 for video generation. The total cost is optimized for the value of producing a complete TVC ad.
